description: PyCryptodome is a self-contained Python package of low-level cryptographic primitives. Supports AES, RSA, DES, 3DES, hashing, HMAC, PBKDF2, scrypt, etc.

documentation.example: from Crypto.Cipher import AES; print(AES.new(b'0'*16, AES.MODE_ECB).encrypt(b'0'*16).hex())
documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/pycryptodome && python3 pycryptodome.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/pycryptodome && python3 pycryptodome.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/pycryptodome && python3 pycryptodome.py --help`. Self-contained cryptographic library (AES, RSA, ...).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the crypto category. Fits when the engagement needs: Self-contained cryptographic library (AES, RSA, ...).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Self-contained cryptographic library (AES, RSA, ...).

metadata.example: from Crypto.Cipher import AES; print(AES.new(b'0'*16, AES.MODE_ECB).encrypt(b'0'*16).hex())
